evals.name: positive-trigger-open
evals.prompt: Help me brainstorm what I should learn next in computational psychiatry
evals.expected_output: The skill fires: grounds against the marketplace vault MOCs, the Learn hub vault topics (computational-psychiatry topics already exist there), and the watchlist; diverges 15-30 one-line ideas across at least four lenses; converges to 3-7 with per-cluster discard counts; ends with a routing table where learning ideas carry the Learn-hub stub handoff and any decision-shaped idea routes to pubmed-research-note. Executes nothing.

evals.name: positive-trigger-command
evals.prompt: /brainstorm ideas for new plugins that would save me time in clinic
evals.expected_output: The command triggers the skill with the seed. Grounding includes ROUTING.md and the marketplace catalog (what plugins already exist); diverge and converge as usual; kept tooling ideas route to plugin-creator as /new-plugin one-liners — the session does not scaffold any plugin itself.

evals.name: negative-trigger-decision
evals.prompt: Should I add aripiprazole to sertraline for treatment-resistant OCD?
evals.expected_output: Does not fire — a formed clinical decision routes to pubmed-research-note per Step 0 and the Not-for clause; brainstorming it would be a failure condition.

evals.name: negative-trigger-lock
evals.prompt: Interview me until you're sure you understand the app I want to build
evals.expected_output: Does not fire — narrowing an already-chosen task to one reading is intent-lock's job; brainstorm is the opposite move (many readings), per the Not-for clause.
